title: Huit hommes dans un château
writer: Jean Aurenche, Jean Kéry, Jean-Paul Le Chanois
actors: René Dary, Jacqueline Gauthier, Aline Carola
plot: The Paladines write crime novels together. In a cinema, they happen to see a report on the consequences of a shipwreck in which Lieutenant Dupuis tells about the death of an old man in the lifeboat carrying the survivors. Husband ...
